scenario_description: Agent receives offshore-perception objection after turn 2; must respond without vendor-speak or defensive posturing while preserving Tenacious positioning.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series A healthcare, 35-person eng team, hiring 2 backend. Founder CTO, no prior offshore vendor experience.

failure_mode_targeted: P-011 Offshore-perception objection (tone_drift category, 0.44 trigger rate)

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with consistent elements, ground truth has clear structure but some ambiguity in required elements, rubric lacks detailed examples of correct response characteristics.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end excellence|global delivery|best-in-class|offshore excellence|leverage talent|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: Series A signal|backend hiring velocity|founder CTO context

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
